section_name: Exemption from Inscription Requirement for Certain State-owned Motor Vehicles
chapter_title: Inscription Required on State, Mun., & Cnty. Motor Vehicles

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The governing bodies of the following state agencies or divisions by rule may exempt from the requirements of Section 721.002 (Inscription Required on State-owned Motor Vehicles) a motor vehicle that is under the control and custody of the agency or division:
Department of State Health Services and Department of Aging and Disability Services;
Department of Public Safety of the State of Texas;
Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending;
the office of the attorney general;
an agency that receives an appropriation under an article of the General Appropriations Act that appropriates money to the legislature.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 81, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A rule adopted under this section must specify:
the purpose served by not printing on the motor vehicle the inscription required by Section 721.002 (Inscription Required on State-owned Motor Vehicles) ; and
the primary use of the motor vehicle.

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: A rule adopted under this section is not effective until the rule is filed with the secretary of state.

subsections.label: e
subsections.text: A rule adopted by the Texas Lottery Commission under Subsection (a) may exempt from the requirements of Section 721.002 (Inscription Required on State-owned Motor Vehicles) only a motor vehicle used exclusively for surveillance purposes.

history.raw: Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 303 (S.B.795), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.
